ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Statue Of Closing
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Continued To Aug-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that it is 9:50 a.m. and there is no appearance. An Order to Appear will be issued to the executor Michael Taylor to appear on August 1, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for final distribution has not been filed, with an order that the petition be on file by July 18, 2016 . The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Taylor in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that no one appeared to object. Mr. Taylor stated that his Father passed away in 2005, that he just found out about this account in Florida, that it is a substantial amount and that he will follow through with other probate requirements with the assistance of a Paralegal. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary (order for the same in open Court). Bond is not required. The copy of the lost will dated September 24, 2001 is admitted to probate.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
